items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for photo/video evidence attachments.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of photo/video evidence attachments, which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the existence or functionality of these attachments. The absence of any related evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
